Somewhere in the forgotten depths of space awaits a graveyard of dead, forgotten ships and stations. What treasures lie within? More than that, who will try to get there first? Face your rivals and claim victory for who can search the wreckage!

Lost Rendezvous is a 2-4 Player game of arena combat. All characters have different movement abilities, as well as how they fight and defend themselves. With explosive simultaneous action and decisions, Lost Rendezvous is unlike any battle game yet!

Players draw three cards. One is chosen for the movement pattern, while another will have your attack, its strength, and the defense allotted to you, in addition to any special effects. Players reveal their moves together, and then their attacks. Going in order of speed values, damage is dealt, effects are resolved, and then move to the next round!

The last character standing is the winner!

-description from designer
These promotional tiles include two new gods and a new queens pyramid tile as well as the rules for including them in the game.

"A two player strategic node superiority game"

Rotate a square of 4 pieces on the board using a unique magnetic component. The goal is also rather unique as two conditions must be met:

1. "Isolate" your opponent's "main node" by surrounding it with your own nodes (or pieces). And...
2. "Connect" your "main node" with your opponent's "main node".

You may not rotate the exact nodes that were rotated on your opponent's previous turn. Some variable setups allow the game to be customized.

"Rotodo, das Spiel mit dem Dreh! Hast du den Dreh raus? Dann komm auf die andere Seite und zeig deinem Gegner wo's lang geht!"

Humorous roll and move party game where players complete various challenges revealed by cards that make up the track of the board. Promotional tie in for the Santa Maria line of tex mex food products.

Translated from the publisher's website:

Cheers all taco fans! Taco Time! is a slightly strange, highly unexpected and very appetizing party game from Santa Maria that challenges everything to do with lame dinners. Who can spin a tortilla on their finger for the longest time? Can you guess how many tattoos everyone around the table has in total? And who is most likely to bring cheese dip into the bedroom? Show up for Taco Friday, put out some extra chairs and challenge everyone you know in the new game from Santa Maria!

The game is recommended for ages 8 and up and is suitable for 2-8 players.

boardgame: Heroscape: The Swamps of Valhalla Terrain Expansion
description:
Build and Customize!

Many see the receding mire of swamplands as a sign of victory, for it heralds the decline of the Marro scourge that once plagued the land. But to the Kyrie of the Moon Tribe, it is an ill portent. The shallow waters of these remaining swamps teem with life. If they are allowed to disappear, what, or who, will be next?

This expansion contains over 120 hexes and is fully compatible with all Heroscape Master Sets and Expansions. Build new environments over which to battle for Valhalla in Heroscape: The Swamps of Valhalla!

This is add-on content. A Battle Box and/or Master Set is required for Heroscape gameplay.

Simple rules summary: 
The Swamp Underbrush adds +1 Defense from ranged attacks to units adjacent to them and may block Line of Sight.

Swamp Water does not stop movement like normal Water tiles.

Features:
Create the ultimate immersive environment!
Customize your games with treacherous swamp terrain!
Over 30 Hex-tile Terrain Pieces!
2 Swamp Underbrush Pieces!
Fully compatible with all Heroscape Master Sets and Expansions!

Contents:
Hex-tile Terrain Pieces: 36
2 24-hex Swamp tiles
5 7-hex Swamp tiles
2 3-hex Swamp tiles
2 2-hex Swamp tiles
2 1-hex Swamp tiles
20 1-hex Swamp Water tiles
3 3-hex Swamp Water tiles
Swamp Underbrush Pieces: 2
1 Set-up Guide
family: Theme: Wetlands / Swamps / Bogs / Fens / Marshland

description:
“On their homeworld, they are melted down and reforged, reprogrammed. They forget the life that came before,” says the winged woman. “I told you there were no guarantees. He is remade. The eleventh design of his series.”

“Major Q11, then,” he says. “I am named Sonlen. I am your friend. This is Queen Qhyrion; she is the one who reconstructed you. We are not your enemies. Please, lower your weapon. We have brought you to Valhalla for a purpose." Queen Qhyrion lowers her spear. “I have given you an arsenal. Cannons, rockets, a hammer designed by Vydar himself." "Use them to protect your friends,” says Sonlen. “Only harm your enemy. He is a Valkyrie named Utgar. He is the greatest cause of our suffering.”

“Understood,” we say, and seize the hammer of war. [Updating Task: Exterminate Utgar.]

Full Barrage Special Attack
Range Special. Attack Special.
When using Full Barrage Special Attack, Major Q11 may attack up to 3 times. Each attack must target a different figure and must use a different range and attack value from the list below (in any order):
Range 7, Attack 2
Range 5, Attack 3
Range 3, Attack 4
Major Q11 cannot target the same figure more than once per turn with Full Barrage Special Attack.

Vydar's Hammer: When Major Q11 attacks an adjacent figure with a normal attack, you may choose one Small, Medium, or Large figure that is adjacent to the defending figure. If he defending figure receives any would from Major Q11's attack, the chosen figure receives one wound.

The hives of the Skordyre are tightly organized. Each hatchling is assessed as they grow and assigned a roleideally suits both their abilities and the needs of the hive. Some tend the rhinabug cattle, some maintain the tunnels, but many of the bug-folk become soldiers. Thyraxis was highly placed, even among the prestigious warrior caste. She was assigned her own rhinabug, entrusted with its care, and elevated to the rank of Dragoon.
Alongside her fellow elites, Thyraxis was tasked with guarding the tunnels while the Queen and her people hibernated. That is the last she remembers of her home: standing at her post, watching. Then came a horrible, all-consuming sound. Then nothing.  Now her chittering bellows of rage echo across Valhalla without end. Somehow, even in this distant land, she will find her revenge for the cowardly slaughter of her hive.

Maddening Chitter 14
Once per round, before taking a turn with the Thyraxis Dragoon, you may choose an enemy figure within 6 clear sight spaces of Thyraxis and roll the 20-sided die. If you roll at 14 or higher, you may look at one unrevealed Order Marker on that figure's Army card. You may then choose any other figure controlled by the same player and move the Order Marker to that figure's Army Card.

Battle Frenzy 16 
After attacking with Thyraxis Dragoon, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 16 or higher, you may attack again with Thyraxis.

Thyraxis Dragoon was available as a Spring 2025 Organized Play promo!

Goghme is played on a 4x4 board with 16 metal tiles.

A player wins by creating four of their magnets in a row in any direction.
On their turn, a player must choose between two actions: 
placing one of their magnets on an empty tile 
or flipping a tile.

When flipped, a magnet on the tile disappears from view, while any hidden magnet underneath becomes visible.

Players cannot take an action on the same tile where their opponent last acted.

The first magnet placed by the starting player must be hidden under a tile to prevent starting advantage.

—description from the designer

This expansion will not only enrich your gaming experience but will also immerse you even deeper into the Gods Heist universe.

With this expansion, you will be able to:

- Explore a new section of the sanctuary: The Labyrinth of Dementia. 3 new expeditions and exciting new side quests!
- Discover and play as 3 new Marauders, each with their unique abilities.
- Get your hands on 6 incredible new artifacts with extraordinary powers.

All these elements will perfectly integrate with the base game expeditions, offering you even more strategic options and replayability.

boardgame: Yōkai Quest: Secrets of the Snow Peaks
description:
A great evil is plaguing the northern province. The temple in the mountains has been invaded by a strange being. Without the magical protection of the temple, the monsters it guards could be set free.

Gather a group of heroes to discover what has happened and protect the country from a possible apocalypse.

Yokai Quest: Secrets of the Snow Peaks is an expansion for Yokai Quest Strikes Back with new heroes, new missions, and new rules.

boardgame: The Escape Room Game: Haunted Cinema Edition
description:
Hello, welcome to The Escape Room Game: Haunted Cinema Edition. Similar to many escape rooms, you are locked up and your goal is to escape by finding the correct tickets within 60 minutes. Use your brain to solve various puzzles and riddles. Teamwork, communication, creativity, logic, and attention to detail are all very important.

Haunted Cinema has 10 puzzles. In 8 of the puzzles, you must find a clue to 1 of the 9 provided tickets (1 of the tickets will not be used). Use the final 2 puzzles to place the tickets with the correct movie and theater number in order to 'escape’. Make sure to examine the tickets and every puzzle closely.

- description from publisher

boardgame: G.I. JOE Deck-Building Game: The Crimson Veil Expansion
description:
Cobra has gone undercover in The Crimson Veil. Utilizing the Twins Tomax & Xamot’s elite Crimson Guard, they have infiltrated organizations around the globe, including G.I. JOE! With their forces positioned, they are ready to take over from within. To fight back against these threats, G.I. Joe has begun construction of a new mobile battle station: The General.

The Crimson Veil features new player cards and 2 new Missions to face. This expansion also features Intel dice for new Intel Missions, and a giant card for The General. Bring it online, and keep it repaired, to aid you in thwarting Cobra’s plans!

This is an expansion. The G.I. JOE Deck-Building Core Game is required to play.

Features:
New Intel dice are critical for sniffing out and dealing with the Undercover Crimson Guard!
The General Mobile Platform adds powerful abilities to the game!
Includes 4 new Leaders and 2 new story missions!

Contains:
21 Main Deck Cards
8 Cobra Operative Cards
10 Complication Cards
4 Leader Cards
36 Mission Cards
10 Cobra Transport Cards
2 Locust Cards
2 Expert Mode Cards
1 The General Giant Card
1 Intel Mission Tile
8 Intel Dice
6 Damage Tokens
1 Rulebook

-description from publisher's website

Space Potato is a small box worker placement game. You are stranded in space. Your spaceship was hit by an asteroid, shaped like a massive potato. Now, each of the corporations must mine critically needed resources from the asteroid to make repairs to their shared ship, while simultaneously collecting valuable resources for their companies.

On your turn you will place astronaut workers to take actions, mine the asteroid, or build essential components to repair the ship. Players will also manage their resources on their player boards and refine resources like Gold and Iridium into ingots to get points. Players will be rewarded with points for mining away chunks of the asteroid, refining materials, and repairing parts of the ship.

The player with the most points when the ship is finally repaired wins!

Space Potato is a 60-90 minute playing game.

-description from designer

boardgame: WWE Road to Wrestlemania Board Game
description:
Road to Wrestlemania where players go on a wild ride in the WWE ring to get to Wrestlemania games.

Fun action games where players face opponents, draw cards to direct their next move on this WWE game.

The players will flip a card to move around the board. The players are racing to the ends spot on the board (a place in the Wrestlemania main event).

This travel board games includes WWE board game, 40 WWE Cards and 4 player pieces. For ages 6 and up

boardgame: Age of Rail: South Africa – Expansion Maps: Allegheny & La Pampa
description: One double-sided board featuring two new maps to expand your game of Age of Rail strategies. Allegheny is on one-side and La Pampa is on the other.

boardgame: Creepshow: The Suspense-Building Game – Creepy Convention Attendee Promo Card
description:
Originally available at Gen Con 2024.

Any creep show scores points on this story scores 1 extra point.

Welcome to the exciting world of bartending! This new open-draft game for 2-5 players is set in the bustling bar industry, where each player competes to become the top bartender in the city. You'll craft delicious cocktails using available ingredients, manage your resources carefully, and outshine your rivals with creativity and skill. With over 20 unique cocktail recipes to discover, every game session is a fresh challenge!

Perfect for young audiences who are ready to take a break from slaying goblins and exploring dungeons, this game offers a fun and refreshing experience in a vibrant, modern setting. Mix, shake, and serve your way to victory—may the best bartender win!

—description from the designer

Arthurian Legends is a standalone expansion set that adds more than 220 new cards for players to create new, epic stories. Will you answer the call, leave your comfortable castle and embark on a journey fraught with great peril?

Two players take the roles of Avatars, assemble their own decks, and then cast a variety of elemental spells, summon powerful minions, and shape the world around them from their Atlas to increase their dominance and ultimately banish their foe.

Sorcery is a realm contested by Avatars with one goal: to be the last Avatar standing. In order to win, a player must first put their opponent’s Avatar at Death’s Door by reducing its life total to 0. After that, the player must then deliver the final Death Blow to the dying Avatar, which rewards them with the win. A player also wins if their opponent attempts to draw a card from an empty deck—either the Atlas or Spellbook — or if their opponent surrenders.

Sorcery: Contested Realm is played over a series of turns. Players take their turn, one at a time, following 3 phases:

Start Phase
Untap Step: Untap your Avatar, minions, and relics.
Draw Step: Draw a card from your Spellbook or Atlas. If you are the first player, skip this step on your first turn of the game.
Start Step: “At the start of turn” abilities trigger.

Main Phase
You may, in any order:
Cast spells; Activate abilities; Interact with relics; Move with a minion; Attack with a minion;

End Phase
Rest Step: Remove damage from all minions.
End Step: “Until the end of turn” abilities end, and the turn passes to your opponent.

A malevolent force is encroaching upon the kingdom. Waves of beast and monsters have driven the citizens from their homes to the central keep. Now with the enemy closing in, the most resolute heroes have vowed to hold off the hordes, until the last villager makes it to the harbor for possible evacuation if the final defenses should fail.

The Final Defense is a solo Print-and-Play tower defense game. Take on the role of three heroes with unique strengths and abilities fighting off waves of enemies spawned by dice rolls.

—description from the designer

The second Alpaca Bonus Pack arrives to enrich your games with two new cuddly Alpacas:


     The Halloween Alpaca
     The Christmas Alpaca


The Pack contains 2 new types of Alpacas (for a total of 8 cards to add to your deck) plus a summary card with the abilities of the new Alpacas!

The Field-Trip Mini Expansion can be played in games with 2-6 players, and introduces an additional way for Humans to enter and move around The Wilderness. It comes with 3 large vehicle meeples (Camper Van, Mobile Lab, and Hunting Rig) corresponding to each Human type.

Robin Hood as new character to search on the hidden object picture.
This promo was part of the Spielbox 5/2024 issue.
family: Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Robin Hood

description:
Alone or with you friends, face the formidable perils of this new land you have just entered. This expansion offers a real challenge in solo and in cooperation where you face up to 4 AI (The Pirates, The Barbarians, The Cliff-Walkers, and The Enlightened)

This card set adds a solo and coop mode to Rise & Fall. It contains 60 cards, 2 dice, and rules.

It was included in the French version of the game, but an extra buy for the English or German version.

From the makers of best-selling quiz game Shot in the Dark...

Without a Doubt - the hilarious quiz game of ridiculous questions, guesswork, and knowing when to back yourself.

The perfect quiz leveller - Without a Doubt can be enjoyed (and won) by everyone aged 12 - 112, even those who don't usually like quizzes.

—description from the publisher

One box containing both Buzzword and Buzzword Junior.

First, divide everyone into two teams. On your team's turn, one member attempts to give clues to 10 words. The cards state its "buzzword". Other team members must solve each clue by saying the phrases that includes the buzzword. Meanwhile, the other team keeps track of the time and the missed clues. Score one point for each correctly solved clue. The clue giver reads the missed clues to the other team, giving them a chance to score. First team to reach 50 points wins. Watch out! You only get 45 seconds to complete your answers to questions ranging from easy to quite difficult.

Includes Buzz Word junior
With clues for all ages, Buzzword Junior is the perfect family game. It is played in teams with 4 or more players, ages 7 and up.

boardgame: The Escape Room Game: Cabin in the Woods Edition
description:
Hello, welcome to The Escape Room Game: Cabin in the Woods Edition. Similar to many escape rooms, you are locked up and your goal is to escape by finding the correct key within 60 minutes. Use your brain to solve various puzzles and riddles. Teamwork, communication, creativity, logic, and attention to detail are all very important.

Cabin in the Woods has 9 puzzles. In 7 of the puzzles, you must find a clue to 1 of the 9 provided keys (2 of the keys will not be used). Use the final 2 puzzles to place the keys in the correct locks in order to ‘escape’. Both sides of the keys have information corresponding with the clues. Make sure to examine the keys closely.

—description from the publisher

Do you know what can be seen on Red Square with the letter "L" and what is played in Moscow with letter "V" in a minute? Can you name more than your neighbor professions that are in demand in capital with letter "S"?

Соображарий: Москва ("Think It Up!: Moscow") is a version of famous hit Think It Up! dedicated to capital of Russia. Game will appeal to anyone born in Moscow or came to conquer it or just familiar with it.

Game can be played with other Think It Up! boxes.

Take two decks of cards, categories and letters, and shuffle each deck separately. Place them face down in the center of the table. Then, take turns pulling a category card first (read it out loud!), followed by a letter card. When both cards touch the table, it is the goal of each player to name a word that starts with the letter on the dropped category card. The player who comes up with an answer faster wins the category card for themselves.

There are hidden cards in each deck that have special rules. For example, "Who word is the longest?", "Who word has the shortest?", "Who tells more?", and "Previous letter" are all cards that can be used to determine the winner. Some of these require the use of a timer.

The winner is the player with the most points at the end of the game. Each card from a category or a special drawing is worth one point. However, for each letter in your own deck, you lose two points.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Знаете, что можно увидеть на Красной площади на букву "Л"? А во что играют в Москве на букву "В"? А сможете за минуту назвать больше востребованных в столице профессий на букву "С", чем ваш сосед?

"Соображарий: Москва" – это версия знаменитого хита "Соображарий", которая посвящена столице нашей необъятной родины. Игра придётся по душе каждому, кто родился в Москве, приехал её покорять или просто хорошо с ней знаком: на кон будет поставлена ваша непосредственная честь как москвича (или москволюбителя). Играть в неё можно вдвоём с другом, но максимум веселья вы получите в большой компании. Только представьте: поворот карты, нервы на пределе, очертания буквы, скрежет шестерёнок в голове, движение губ... кто из вас успеет сказать слово первым? Главное не забывайте – тематика-то московская!

Игру можно смешивать с другими "Соображариями".

Возьмите две колоды карт, – категории и буквы, – и перетасуйте каждую по отдельности. Положите их в центр стола рубашкой вверх. Затем по очереди тяните сначала карту категории (не забудьте её зачитать!), а следом – карту буквы. В момент, когда обе карты касаются стола: цель каждого игрока – назвать слово на выпавшую букву, являющееся ответом к выпавшей категории. Тот, кто успел придумать ответ быстрее остальных, забирает карту категории себе.

В колоде также спрятаны карты, которые открывают особый розыгрыш: "Кто последний?", "Кто длиннее?", "Кто короче?", "Кто больше?" и "Предыдущая буква". Для некоторых из них вам понадобится таймер.

Побеждает тот, кто в результате финального подсчёта соберёт больше всего победных баллов. Балл начисляется за каждую карточку категории или особого розыгрыша. При этом за каждую букву, оказавшуюся в вашей колоде, вы теряете 2 очка.

—description from the publisher (Russian)

All cards are shuffled well and dealt out. Each player receives the same number of tokens.

Each player pays a token into the cash register. The cards are held in hand as if they were playing cards. Looking at the number on the back is strictly prohibited. Only the game leader has the right to check the number.

The person who has the first card in their hand starts the game by placing the card face up on the table and reading the text.

Now each player puts down the next card in turn. If the next player does not have the right card, they say "free ride" and the next player plays.

If such a report is made incorrectly, the player in question must pay 1 token into the cash register. If an incorrect card is laid out, the player who notices the error calls "Stop". He can take the card to his own. The player who played incorrectly pays 1 token to the winner. Anyone who calls out "Stop" incorrectly must pay a penalty of 2 tokens to the player who played the card.

If one of the players has no cards left, he can draw one from the player to his left without looking at the number.

The player who plays the last card wins and receives the contents of the cash register.

Legend Academy Deluxe Bundle includes a copy of Legend Academy "Deluxe edition" with The Arthurian Legends Expansion & Chinese Legends Expansion both come with their own plastic trays inside of the base game box.  The All in Bundle - added other components that did not affect game play.


Chinese Legends Expansion: This expansion includes two new playable asymmetric characters from Chinese Folklore (Hua Mulan & Bai Shuzhen).

Hua Mulan: She's attacking focused and can make lots of combo attacks by manipulating her stamina line (reusing cards multiple times in a turn). She also has some great Wisdom Cards like "Ready Stance" that help her pull stamina cards from her discard pile back into her hand to do even more in a turn.

Bai Shuzhen: She is actually a demon transformed into a human body, so she has some demon-like abilities to manipulate enemies, making some epic turns. It was very different to develop her skills because she can transform into a snake; She has some very cool movement cards (some move cards can move very far but must be in a straight line).

Arthurian Legends Expansion: This expansion includes two new playable asymmetric characters from Arthurian Folklore.

Morgana Character: Morgana's story and character from Arthurian legends have been told many ways over the years, so we tried to pick and choose her story that fits most in this school setting. In some stories, she was initially a healer that eventually turned evil. We ran with that and gave her some skill cards that toyed with that "Darkness Within." She is a powerful sorceress and very different than other characters in the game. She's the most magical of all of the characters in the game.

Arthur Character: Arthur is a fearless leader. He is able to boost his attributes (Strength, Wisdom, Charisma, and Endurance) temporarily to have some incredible turns. He can improve his fellow classmates while also taking some of the credit for what they accomplish.

-description from Gamefound campaign
family: Theme: King Arthur / The Knights of the Round Table / Camelot

description:
Note: Never produced by company before going bankrupt.

To raise money to offset the soaring prices of freight, shipping, manufacturing, and inflation, we’re offering an El Dorado Games promo pack to all of our backers for current and previous games.

This pack includes 10 mystery cards - all of which will be optional gameplay modules and crazy abilities with new artwork that can be added into your games and be a ton of fun to play.

This pack includes:

     2 The Island of El Dorado Promo Cards
     1 Capone Promo Card
     1 Taco Fight Promo Card
     2 Windward Promo Cards
     2 The Age of Atlantis Promo Cards
     2 Legend Academy Promo Cards


—description from the publisher
Adds 120 new words to Perfect Words themed after entertainment, sports, music and pop culture.
Adds 120 new words to Perfect Words themed after geography and history.

On a player's turn, they roll a die and move their piece across a map of Poland. The number of spaces they move is determined by the result of the roll. The goal is to land on spaces representing National Parks. Once a player lands on a National Park space, they must answer a trivia question related to the park they are currently in. If the player answers correctly, they earn a National Park card.

Players collect stamps by obtaining two cards from the same park. Collecting stamps is crucial for victory, as players need three different park stamps to win the game.

In addition to trivia, there are objective cards and action cards that introduce additional challenges and opportunities throughout the game, adding variety to the experience.

Game End & Winning:

The game ends when a player collects three stamps from different parks. The first player to achieve this wins the game, demonstrating their knowledge and exploration of Poland’s beautiful natural heritage!

W swojej turze gracz rzuca kostką i porusza się po mapie Polski o liczbę pól równą wynikowi rzutu. Celem jest wylądowanie na polach oznaczających Parki Narodowe. Kiedy gracz znajdzie się na polu Parku Narodowego, musi odpowiedzieć na pytanie dotyczące tego parku. Jeśli odpowie poprawnie, zdobywa kartę Parku Narodowego.

Gracze zbierają pieczątki poprzez zdobycie dwóch kart z tego samego parku. Zebranie pieczątek jest kluczowe do zwycięstwa, ponieważ gracz potrzebuje trzech różnych pieczątek parków, aby wygrać.

Oprócz pytań, w grze znajdują się także karty celów i karty akcji, które wprowadzają dodatkowe wyzwania i możliwości, dodając urozmaicenia w rozgrywce.

Koniec gry i zwycięstwo:

Gra kończy się, gdy gracz zdobędzie trzy pieczątki z różnych parków. Pierwszy gracz, któremu się to uda, wygrywa, pokazując swoją wiedzę i eksplorację piękna przyrody Polski!

Polska przyroda to rodzinna gra planszowa dla miłośników polskiej fauny i flory. Podczas wędrówki przez parki narodowe gracze będą przemierzać malownicze regiony Polski i poznawać ciekawostki dotyczące roślin, zwierząt i atrakcji przyrodniczych. A przy okazji rozwiążą zagadki, zbiorą pieczątki i zaplanują własne podróże.

The King of Tokyo: Tournament Kit is designed to facilitate organized play, with components included to run a 16-person tournament or two 8-person tournaments.

The main prize included is a new monster, Globe Smasher, which IELLO dubs monster #99 in the King of Tokyo catalog. The kit contains three other monsters — Lynxote, Scheggiatron, and Marhanagy Szürke — that used to be exclusively distributed within particular countries (Spain, Italy, and Hungary).

Finally, the kit contains 16 buttons as well as 18 promo cards, specifically six copies each of three new cards, which can also be used as prizes.

boardgame: King of Tokyo: Duel – Baby Gigazaur
description:
King of Tokyo: Duel – Baby Gigazaur is a promotional monster for King of Tokyo: Duel that allows you to steal energy from your opponent — or damage your opponent should they lack the energy to satisfy your demands. Promo cards are packaged with this monster card.

King of Tokyo: Duel – Baby Gigazaur will initially be distributed as a prize at tournaments, then later be made available for retail purchase.

boardgame: The Imposter Kings: Fragments of Nersetti
description:
The Imposter Kings: Fragments of Nersetti is an expansion from a highly acclaimed Kickstarter game that was funded in 2020. The expansion adds many new paths for players to take to the Throne. From the powerful Immortal card to the vast armies of soldiers each player can recruit and the different versions of the King, the Fragments of Nersetti will be a unique and unforgettable experience every playthrough.

The court of the Kingdom of Nersetti is colored by a constant struggle to win the Throne. Growing impatient with the crawl of bureaucracy, the Immortals from the nearby state of Bhunari have staged a coup. Known for their endless numbers and fierce presence in the battlefield, the Immortals have a strong claim to take the Throne through force.

Fortunately, Nersetti is protected by a wide array of tools designed to ensure the Kingdom's survival. Mustering their forces, the many corners of the Kingdom align themselves for war.

Fragments of Nersetti introduces new mechanics, ensuring that no two games are the same.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Die Legenden von Andor: Die Ewige Kälte – Orennah
description:
Immerse yourself in the world of Andor and embark on an epic journey in Andor - The Eternal Cold. With the promo legend Orennah you will experience another exciting adventure and tricky challenges. This legend takes place directly after legend 4 of Andor - The Eternal Cold.
While the snow slowly melts, the threat posed by the mysterious creature called Orennah has not yet been averted. Brave heroes and heroines must once again face the unknown and prove their skills in order to save Andor from impending disaster. Discover the land in the east of Andor and continue the legend of Andor.

—description from the publisher

What the heck is A Normal Card Game?
It’s a party-like combat card game where you summon quirky creatures, equip powerful items, and cast game-changing spells to outsmart and outlast your friends and family! With no deck-building required, it’s quick and easy to set up for any game night.

How does it work?
The goal is simple, be the last player with HP remaining! Players draw from two shared decks, mixing and matching cards to create their ultimate hand. Summon creatures to fight for you, boost them with items, and unleash spells to turn the tide of battle. And if you’re desperate, you can even sacrifice your own HP to draw more cards, but be careful, you might drain too much!

Why is it different?
Unlike traditional card games, A Normal Card Game thrives on unpredictability and chaos. There are no complicated deck-building rules, and everyone draws from the same two piles, ensuring that every match feels fresh and fun.

—description from the designer

Cronocartas: Historia de Galicia ("Cronocards: History of Galicia") is a card game with Galicia history theme. Each card has an image and a text that represents a key point or achievement in the Galician history, art, gastronomy or culture.
The front and back of each card are identical, except for the fact that the back of the card include also the year in which the event happened.

Each player is given 7 cards face up so that the year is not visible to them.
One card is then placed face down (so that the year is visible) on the table.
Each player, in his/her turn, will place one of his/her cards face up before, after or between the cards already in the table and then turn it faced down so that the year is visible. If the card has been correctly placed chronologically, the card remains on the table, otherwise, the card is discarded, and the player takes another card. The first player to finish the cards wins.

For an additional degree of difficulty, instead of discarded an incorrectly placed cards, leave it on the table face down (with the year visible) in its correct position.

—description from the designer
One mega machine board with 6 corresponding university inventions.

Mafia Extortion!
If you are using the car bomb module from the expansion Final Chapter, you can place the car boot card together with a weapon and a money bag card next to the event card pile when preparing the game.

The player who owns the car can access the cards in the car boot at any time and use them like cards in their hand.

boardgame: King of Tokyo/New York: Monster Pack – Luchador
description:
Like other such expansion, King of Tokyo/New York: Monster Pack – Luchador consists of multiple elements that can be added to your games individually or together.

First, the monster Luchador enters the ring, with or without power cards depending on how you play King of... games.

Second, the expansion introduces "challenge mode", with each monster donning a mask at the start of play. If you damage a monster in Tokyo (or New York) and that monster doesn't retreat, you can challenge them to a one-on-one match. Each of you will play a challenge card face down, and other players can contribute challenge cards to one side of the match or the other.

Whoever pulls off the best wrestling move — a "Giant Powerhouse perhaps? — wins the match and takes the other monster's mask, which is worth 2 VP as long as you hold it.

In Farewell, you play as a mystical ferry-dragon navigating the ocean of the deceased, seeking lost spirits and guiding them to their final resting places. Each spirit’s requirement is unique, requiring thoughtful decisions and strategic moves.

The game unfolds over two main phases: Drafting phase, where you assemble your decks, and Journey phase, where you use those cards to collect spirits. Movement and card placement are crucial as you meet the requirements to pick up spirits.

Your objective is to gather all spirits before your draw deck depletes. Every decision matters as you balance your resources and optimize moves, seeking to fulfill your mission before running out of cards.

—description from the designer

Dragoon Empire is a fantasy medieval war game, designed for one to five players. Sumerge in a strategic area control, and worker placement board game. Take control of one of four heroes and their army to defend your castle from other heroes and outsider dragon hordes. Or take the role of the dragon horde.

Collect resources from mines, crops, and forests to upgrade your hero player board and grow your army of knights and archers. Collect hidden abilities from the market that can be used when needed and change the turn's outcome.

Each hero has unique power dice that range from earthquake attacks to healing powers. 
  
This war game unfolds from 45 to 120 minutes, crafted with different winning path strategies, be the first to reach 25 points to win the game. Gain points by attacking other players or dragons, upgrading, and completing hidden objectives. A player loses if their hero is killed.

Another in the legendary La Bataille series from the original designers, Marshal Enterprises. La Bataille d’ Eggmuhl represents the pivotal two-day battle (April 21 -22 1809) between the forces of the French and their Allies, directed by Emperor Napoleon and the Army of Austria commanded by Archduke Charles (Erzherzog Karl), west of the Danube.
 Includes ''La Bataille de Raszyn 1809'' and  La Bataille d’Alteglofsheim 1809. Only 400 copies were printed.

Three download games supplemental to Eggmuhl have been published: Rohr, Duenzling, and Thann. These are available on the ME website.

description: The game Γνωρίζω την Ευρώπη is an educational game designed with the help of experts in child psychology, sociology and pedagogy. It belongs to the Sapientino games series. Silver Linings is a card game for all ages, it can be played by 2 to 4 people. With three different game modes, co-op, tag-team and competitive.

The goal of the game is to score the most points. In essence, the Seasons all compete against each other for YOUR love. They want to be the most popular and most beloved of the year. And for them to be considered that, players take on the mantle of one of the Seasons and use cards to manipulate the weather, celebrate or cause a little mischief.

Stibro is a loop-forming game played on a regular hexagonal board. The game is guar-
anteed to end with a winning loop. The recommended board size is 7 or larger. The pie rule may be used for balance.

				
				
					Rules1. Players alternate placing one black resp. white stone on the board.
2. Passing is not allowed.
3. Each player must always have at least one free group of their colour on the board.
A free group is a group that both:
(a) does not touch the edge;
(b) has at least two cells between itself and at least one opponent group that does
not touch the edge.
Neither player may make a placement that would violate this restriction. Note that
this means neither player may place their first stone on the edge, and the second
player must start at least 2 spaces away from the first player.
4. The first player to complete a loop around empty cells and/or opponent pieces wins.

—description from the designer

1. Slipper-star race.
The three slippers of the same color are placed in the large slippers of the same color. The players take turns to roll and move. After every 6, you can roll the die again. If there is already another slipper on the space that your slipper has to be placed on, your own slipper is placed next to it. The slippers are now placed forward until they reach a space of the same color. There the corresponding slipper turns towards the star. Whoever gets all the slippers in the star first is the winner of the star race. (In the variant Slipper-Hunt, other slippers are thrown out and have to begin anew.)

2. Catching Slippers.
Setup as above. The slippers can use the circle to the right and left and also the middle space without the star. They can also run directly around the star. If a slipper lands on a space where there is already one of a different color, it is placed on the one there so that the toe and heel of both are on top of each other. If a slipper has brought one or more slippers under itself, it unloads them in its big slipper space in the corner. Slippers of your own color that you have brought with you are freed and used again. Whoever has caught the most slippers at the end has won the game.

3. Slipper mosaic.
Each player has to catch one slipper of each of the three remaining colors and place them on the three-pointed star after bringing them in. The game is over when the first mosaic of three slippers is full.

4. Slipper tower.
The caught slippers are not brought in, but the die is rolled until all 12 slippers are stacked to one tower.

Hula is a game where players aim to form a loop around the center of a regular hexagonal board, using their own stones and, possibly, some number of neutral stones. The recommended board size is 6, though 5 or 7 can be used for a quicker or a longer game.
The pie rule may be used for balance.

				
				
					Rules
     Play on a regular hexagonal board with the center cell marked and blocked.
     Passing is not allowed.
     On your turn, place a stone of your colour on any free space, but:
     If your placement would connect the center cell with the edge through a monocoloured group (so not counting neutral stones), place a neutral stone instead.
     The first player to form a loop around the center cell with stones of their colour, possibly including some neutral stones, wins. If both loops are created at the same time (through the placement of a neutral stone), the player with the shortest loop wins. If the loops are equally long, the player whose loop contains fewer neutrals wins. If this is also equal, the second player wins.


—description from the designer

boardgame: Соображарий: Три кота (Think It Up!: Kid-E-Cats)
description:
Соображарий: Три кота ("Think It Up! Kid-E-Cats") is a fun and entertaining game for children, but their parents can also join in. You have to remember as many words as possible quickly and name them so that they meet certain conditions. This game board will be enjoyed by fans of the same cartoon, as well as everyone else!

A participant opens a card, reads what's on it aloud, and places it next to a stack of tasks. Then, they demonstrate the letter map so everyone can see. Now that the rules are set, everyone tries to name a word that matches the open task starting with the given letter. Whoever names the word first gets the task card.

Also, in the game, there are special cards called "Two Words!!" and "Three Words!!". When these cards are revealed, you can name two or three words, respectively, following the current task.

The final round is announced when the last letter of the task or the final task is revealed in the deck. At the end of the round, players count their cards. Each player earns one point. The player with the most points wins!

There is also a team mode called "Together With Parents", which is great for playing with families. In this mode, each player works as part of a team, teaching children how to work together. Everyone wins or loses together.

—description from the publisher (translated)

•••
"Соображарий: Три кота" – это весёлая и занимательная игра для компании детей, которые, впрочем, не будут против, если к игре присоединятся и их родители. Придётся как можно быстрее вспоминать различные слова и называть их, да так, чтобы они подходили под определённые условия. Эта настолка придётся по вкусу не только поклонникам одноимённого мультфильма, но и всем-всем-всем!

Участник игры открывает карту, читает вслух, что на ней, после чего размещает рядом с колодой заданий. Далее он таким же образом демонстрирует карту буквы, чтобы все могли увидеть её. Ну а теперь, когда условия для слова заданы, каждый участник спешит назвать слово, которое подходит открытому заданию и начинается на открытую букву. Тот, кто оказался проворнее остальных и первым назовёт подходящее слово, забирает себе карту задания.

Также в игре присутствуют особые карты "Два слова!!" и "Три слова!!!". При открывании таких карт можно назвать два и три слова соответственно, также следуя текущим заданиям.

Последний раунд объявляется перед тем, как будет открыта последняя буква или задание в колоде. По окончании этого раунда игроки подсчитывают свои карты заданий. Каждая из них приносит 1 очко. У кого больше очков – тот лучше всех соображает, тот и победил!

Правила предлагают командный режим "Вместе с родителями", которые отлично подойдёт для совместной игры в кругу семьи. В этом режиме всем предстоит работать в команде, что научит детей совместному взаимодействию. Участники побеждают или проигрывают все вместе.

—description from the publisher (Russian)

boardgame: Valheim: The Board Game – Berliner / Black Forest Cake Promo Card

Both a strategic and tactical game, requiring the Japanese player to attack, but allowing him to make up to 2 false alarm games, to try to drive up the US player's "precaution" victory point concessions. He will also need to choose armor-piercing bombs or torpedoes for his Kate squadrons and to decide the waves' targets:  battleships (and/or Enterprise, if present), airfields and US squadrons, harbor facilities, or tank farm oil tanks.

2 4-phase (night, morning, noon, afternoon) 24-hour turns with 9 (ergo 40 minute?) hex-by-hex air-(strike-)impulses within each, so the US player has to hex-by-hex sweat out the incoming attacking Japanese air-strike waves, if they remain undetected.
USS Ward vs. Japanese mini-subs, if the Japanese player chooses to use them, risking an early US alert detection.
Risk of USAAC "Don't worry about it." and USN "Confirmation, Kaminsky. I want CONFIRMATION." detection dismissals by incompetent command.
Japanese ships - or bluffing dummies - may enter in the Northern, Northwestern, or Western sectors.

The US player can if he wishes invest in:

Joint Army (Air Corps) and Navy command center, 12 *matching* victory points (equal to 2 *destroyed* not just bottomed battleships). (Historically, both commands got detection warnings but separately dismissed them:  divided command. If divided US command, 2 US players?)
PBY (1 mvp each) and/or USAAC (2 mvps ea) long-range search patrols
Up to 3 subs (2 mvps each) to patrol.
"Readying" or *launching* interceptor etc. squadrons before a *confirmed* detection.  Hmm .... maybe not?

Carrier Enterprise may un-luck out and be in harbor, or may possibly - 1/8 chance - arrive that morning, as historically.  Same arrival possibility for Lexington and *her* squadrons, so the Japanese *could* be facing 2 US carrier groups.

105mis/169kms per operational hex.  Ungridded map of harbor for air (and mini-sub?) attacks.
2 player game, although it has much solitaire potential as-is.

—description from the designer
